recommendations.title: The Legend of the Chupacabras
recommendations.overview: Leo San Juan and his team of "ghostbusters" continue with their adventures, this time fighting against the mexican monster himself: "El Chupacabras".

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Black Charro

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Nahuala

recommendations.title: The Vow
recommendations.overview: Happy young married couple Paige and Leo are, well, happy. Then a car accident puts Paige into a life-threatening coma. Upon awakening she has lost the previous five years of memories, including those of her beloved Leo, her wedding, a confusing rela

recommendations.title: Leo
recommendations.overview: Jaded 74-year-old lizard Leo has been stuck in the same Florida classroom for decades with his terrarium-mate turtle. When he learns he only has one year left to live, he plans to escape to experience life on the outside but instead gets caught up in
recommendations.director: Robert Smigel, Robert Marianetti, David Wachtenheim

recommendations.title: Moana
recommendations.overview: In Ancient Polynesia, when a terrible curse incurred by Maui reaches an impetuous Chieftain's daughter's island, she answers the Ocean's call to seek out the demigod to set things right.

recommendations.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Movie
recommendations.overview: When a mysterious stranger arrives from the future with a dire warning, Leo is forced to rise and lead his brothers, Raph, Donnie, and Mikey in a fight to save the world from a terrifying alien species.

recommendations.title: Jack of the Red Hearts
recommendations.overview: A teenage con artist tricks a desperate mother into hiring her as a live-in companion for her autistic daughter.

recommendations.title: The Flower of My Secret
recommendations.overview: Middle-aged romance author Leo writes under a pseudonym, since she despises her own work. At home, her husband, who works overseas, is distant both physically and emotionally. As she reevaluates her life and writing, Leo is led to an unexpected relat

recommendations.title: Sounds Like Love
recommendations.overview: Fashion assistant Maca has just about got her life together after a devastating breakup, when Leo, the man who broke her heart returns. Seeking support from best friends, Adriana and Jime, all three will learn love can be complicated.
